projects.title: Aravind Portfolio
projects.description: A unique terminal-style portfolio website that showcases skills and projects through an interactive command-line interface.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform | Java Full Stack
projects.description: Developed a scalable E-Commerce web application using Java and Spring Boot, enabling users to browse products, manage carts, place orders, and complete secure payments. Designed RESTful APIs for product catalog, authentication, order management, and integrated MySQL with proper entity relationships.
